percentage_patients.description: Percentage of patients out of total in the result set

percentage_of_total.description: Percentage of patients out of total colorectal cancer patients. Use for mutation prevalence questions where you want each mutation's share of ALL colorectal patients, not just mutation-detected patients.
percentage_of_total.sql: ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT person.person_id) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT co.person_id) FROM anchor_view.condition_occurrence co WHERE (co.condition_source_value LIKE '%C18%' OR co.condition_source_value LIKE '%C19%' OR co.condition_source_value LIKE '%C20%')), 0), 2)
